nodes.name: 鷹鵰
nodes.summary: 鷹鵰（Mountain hawk-eagle，学名 Nisaetus nipalensis），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括铅中毒。
nodes.shortSummary: 熊鷹（學名：Nisaetus nipalensis；排灣語：qadris），又名熊鹰、山鷹鵰、赫氏角鹰、赫氏鷹鵰、亞洲鷹鵰、山地鷹鵰，是鷹科亞洲鷹鵰屬的猛禽，一般棲息於中高海拔的常绿森林，种加词取自指名亚种的主产地尼泊尔。 外觀 熊鷹是一種偏大的鷹科猛禽，一般身長63至80公分…

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Mountain hawk-eagles are additionally found in the island nations of Taiwan and Japan, with the highest concentration known on northern islands such Hokkaido but they may be found on nearly all the islands of Japan.Colijn, B

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Mountain hawk-eagles are additionally found in the island nations of Taiwan and Japan, with the highest concentration known on northern islands such Hokkaido but they may be found on nearly all the islands of Japan.Colijn, B

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: National Birds of Prey Trust, UK. With a fair amount of consistency, the hawk-eagles found in the northern part of southeast Asia range into more lowland areas of Burma, eastern Thailand and peninsular Malaysia

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Birds of Prey Bull, 3(1), 12. Lead poisoning from consuming carcasses of sika deer, left there by human hunters using lead bullets, have resulted in the death of some mountain hawk-eagles. Mountain hawk-eagles may be vulnerable to viruses and helminths as well. Similar threats are faced by all Nisaetus hawk-eagles, with only the changeable hawk-eagle shown to be resilient to human interferences and not in decline at the species level.<ref name="Gjershaug, J
